name: Adaptive Plate
description: Taking an identical Type of Damage twice will activate a temporary holy bubble that grants Damage Reduction. Gain additional Damage Reduction against the specific Damage Types that triggered it. | Tags = Defensive, Armor

name: Aggressive Personality
description: Finishers of Hammers in specific that slam the ground gains a Damage Boost, larger Hitbox, and Taunts on hit.
